top_signals.title: U.S., Iran trade drafts of deal as Israel expands Lebanon assault
top_signals.summary: Israel is not party to the talks between the U.S. and Iran and it's unclear whether it will agree to stop its side war in Lebanon if the war in Iran is resolved.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SoftBank plans 75 billion euros of AI investments in France, as Europe struggles to catch up with U.S. and China
top_signals.summary: The Japanese tech giant plans to develop and operate 5 GW of AI data center capacity in France, with an initial 3.1 GW of facilities in the country's north.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SEC sues Texas man over $12.3 million alleged crypto scheme built on fake AI trading bots
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Policy paper: Financial transaction control framework
top_signals.summary: The government’s approach to managing financial transactions under its fiscal framework.

top_signals.title: Transparency data: Government Major Projects Portfolio – Accounting Officer Assessments Ministry of Justice
top_signals.summary: Accounting officer assessment summaries for the Ministry of Justice (MOJ) programmes and projects in the Government Major Project Portfolio.

top_signals.title: Read-out of the College orientation debate on EU-China relations*
top_signals.summary: European Commission Read-out Brussels, 29 May 2026 Today's orientation debate gave the College of Commissioners an opportunity to take stock of EU-China relations — covering both the opportunities they present and the challenges they pose.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Bond Trader Bets on Fed Hike Poised for Gut Check From Jobs Data - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Bond Trader Bets on Fed Hike Poised for Gut Check From Jobs Data  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Japan wins World Cup sendoff as coach Hajime Moriyasu says goal is to win title
top_signals.summary: Japan coach Hajime Moriyasu stated directly that Japan's goal was to win the World Cup.
